title: BombaProMax WPF — SaisirJaugeageGlobalDialog picker styling
purpose: Detailed record of the picker (ComboBox + DatePicker + Calendar) theming pass on the redesigned Saisir Jaugeage dialog. Companion to shell-polish-log.json issue #12.

issues.title: Reservoir picker empty + outer dialog chrome leaks
symptom: Reservoir ComboBox dropdown was empty when the dialog opened.
FluentWindow showed a default OS chrome frame around the redesigned card.
rootCause: ItemsSource was bound to Draft.AvailableReservoirs (POCO property with no change notification).
FluentWindow renders default WindowChrome unless titlebar extension is requested.
fix: Rebound ItemsSource to the root VM's Reservoirs ObservableCollection.
Added ExtendsContentIntoTitleBar="True" on the FluentWindow.

issues.title: Popup never appeared after first chrome attempt
issues.symptom: Clicking 'Saisir Jaugeage' did nothing; runtime exception.
issues.rootCause: Combined WindowStyle=None + AllowsTransparency=True is incompatible with FluentWindow's built-in WindowChrome and throws at construction.
fix: Removed WindowStyle and AllowsTransparency.
Kept only ExtendsContentIntoTitleBar="True" + Background=NeuBackgroundBrush.
Dropped the outer Margin=12 on the shell Border.
issues.rule: Never combine WindowStyle=None + AllowsTransparency=True on a FluentWindow.

issues.title: Pickers rendered with bare OS visuals
issues.symptom: DatePicker, témoin ComboBox, and réservoir ComboBox all showed default WPF chrome instead of the neumorphic theme.
rootCause: Wpf.Ui v4.2.0 does not ship implicit styles for stock ComboBox / DatePicker / Calendar. The Controls/ComboBox/ComboBox.baml, Controls/DatePicker/DatePicker.baml, and Controls/CalendarDatePicker/CalendarDatePicker.baml resources are keyed only.
There are no ui:ComboBox or ui:DatePicker types — first attempt to substitute them failed to compile.
fix: Applied Style="{DynamicResource NeuComboBoxStyle}" to both ComboBoxes and Style="{DynamicResource NeuDatePickerStyle}" to the DatePicker.
Added NeuDatePickerStyle + NeuDatePickerTextBoxStyle in Styles/Neumorphic.Light.xaml.

issues.title: ComboBox click area limited to the chevron
issues.symptom: Only the small chevron opened the dropdown; clicking on the displayed selection text did nothing — user had to mirror the LanguagePickerHost wrapper hack.
issues.rootCause: Original NeuComboBoxStyle template placed the selection-display ContentPresenter outside the dropdown ToggleButton, and the ToggleButton's Border used Background=Transparent so hit testing only registered on the chevron.
fix: Rewrote NeuComboBoxStyle: moved the selection ContentPresenter inside the dropdown ToggleButton's template.
Set Background="{DynamicResource NeuInputFillBrush}" on the OuterRing Border so the entire pill registers hit-tests.
Forced HorizontalAlignment=Stretch + MinWidth=180 on the ComboBox AND on the inner ToggleButton so the pill fills its column.
issues.rule: The selection-display ContentPresenter must live INSIDE the dropdown ToggleButton template, and the ToggleButton's root Border must have a non-Transparent Background for the full pill to be a single hit target.

issues.title: ComboBox pill shrank to chevron-only (no selected text)
issues.symptom: Both dialog ComboBoxes rendered as a thin pill containing only the chevron — selected items were never displayed. Live Visual Tree reported 6 binding failures: 'SelectionBoxItemTemplate property not found on object of type ToggleButton', 'SelectionBoxItemStringFormat …', 'SelectionBoxItem …'.
issues.rootCause: After moving the ContentPresenter inside the ToggleButton, the {RelativeSource TemplatedParent} bindings now resolved to the inner ToggleButton (which has none of those properties) instead of the outer ComboBox.
fix: Changed all three bindings on SelectionDisplay to RelativeSource={RelativeSource AncestorType={x:Type ComboBox}} so they climb past the ToggleButton up to the actual ComboBox.
Added TextElement.FontSize=13 so the selection text consistently picks up the app font size.
issues.rule: Inside nested templates, RelativeSource TemplatedParent resolves to the IMMEDIATE templated owner. To reach properties of an outer templated control from inside a nested template, use RelativeSource AncestorType={x:Type Foo}.

issues.title: DatePicker still rendered with bare OS chrome
issues.symptom: After NeuDatePickerStyle was applied, the DatePicker still fell back to default WPF visuals.
rootCause: Initial NeuDatePickerStyle Template was incomplete: PART_Popup had no Calendar content wiring, PART_TextBox used a NeuDatePickerTextBoxStyle whose template lacked required parts (PART_Root, PART_DisabledVisual).
PART_Popup was missing PlacementTarget so the Calendar positioning fell back.
fix: Rewrote NeuDatePickerTextBoxStyle: added CaretBrush, SelectionBrush, full ScrollViewer settings (Focusable=False, hidden scrollbars), proper Foreground propagation, and a hidden Watermark ContentControl.
Rewrote NeuDatePickerStyle Template: added BorderBrush, HorizontalContentAlignment=Stretch, Cursor=IBeam, SnapsToDevicePixels on OuterBorder.
Wired PART_Popup with PlacementTarget="{Binding ElementName=OuterBorder}" and Grid.ColumnSpan=2 so the Calendar anchors to the pill.

issues.title: DatePicker font basic + theme-switch glitch
issues.symptom: After the pill was themed the displayed date still rendered in WPF's default font and recolored incorrectly when toggling theme.
rootCause: Inner DatePickerTextBox template's ScrollViewer had no Foreground (fell back to a frozen system color that ignored theme swap).
No FontFamily / FontSize setters were applied to the DatePickerTextBox so it used the WPF default 12 px Segoe UI fallback.
fix: Added FontSize=13 + FontFamily=Segoe UI setters on NeuDatePickerTextBoxStyle.
Propagated font + foreground via TextElement.Foreground / TextElement.FontSize / TextElement.FontFamily on the template root Grid.
Bound PART_ContentHost.Foreground to the templated Foreground so theme changes propagate live.
Hard-coded FontSize=13 + FontFamily=Segoe UI on the inner DatePickerTextBox in NeuDatePickerStyle (replaced unreliable TemplateBinding FontSize).

issues.title: Calendar popup header / arrows / weekday strip unreadable on theme switch
issues.symptom: Calendar popup day cells were themed but the month/year header button, prev/next arrows, and the 'S M T W T F S' weekday titles used hard-coded system brushes — invisible in dark mode.
issues.rootCause: Only CalendarDayButtonStyle was overridden. CalendarItem still used the default WPF template whose internal parts use SystemColors-based brushes that don't follow our theme.
fix: Added NeuCalendarDayButtonStyle (CalendarDayButton): hover, selected, today, inactive triggers with neumorphic brushes.
Added NeuCalendarButtonStyle (CalendarButton): pill chrome for month/year cells in the year/decade views.

Added NeuCalendarItemStyle (CalendarItem) with a full custom Template: themed PART_PreviousButton / PART_HeaderButton / PART_NextButton, NeuTextSecondaryBrush DayTitleTemplateResourceKey, neumorphic PART_MonthView / PART_YearView grids, NeuBackgroundBrush PART_DisabledVisual. DataTriggers on Calendar.DisplayMode swap month-view ↔ year-view visibility.
Added NeuCalendarStyle (Calendar) that composes the three above.
Wired NeuDatePickerStyle to set CalendarStyle="{StaticResource NeuCalendarStyle}" so the DatePicker's auto-created Calendar picks it up.
issues.rule: Theming the day cells alone is not enough. The CalendarItem template owns the header chrome (prev/next/header button) and the weekday title row — override its Template (and DayTitleTemplateResourceKey inside ControlTemplate.Resources) to fully theme the popup.

modifiedKeyedStyles: NeuComboBoxStyle (ComboBox) — full rewrite: full-pill hit area + stretchable layout + ancestor-typed SelectionBox bindings
lessonsLearned: Wpf.Ui v4.2.0 has NO implicit styles for stock ComboBox/DatePicker/Calendar and NO ui:ComboBox / ui:DatePicker types. Custom keyed styles are mandatory.
FluentWindow forbids the WindowStyle=None + AllowsTransparency=True combination. Use ExtendsContentIntoTitleBar=True alone to drop chrome.

For a ComboBox to be clickable across its full surface, the selection-display ContentPresenter must live INSIDE the dropdown ToggleButton's template, AND the ToggleButton's outer Border must have a non-Transparent Background.

Inside a nested template, {RelativeSource TemplatedParent} resolves to the IMMEDIATE templated owner. Use RelativeSource AncestorType={x:Type Foo} to read properties of an outer templated control (e.g. ComboBox.SelectionBoxItem from inside the inner ToggleButton template).

Stock WPF DatePicker requires PART_Root, PART_TextBox (DatePickerTextBox), PART_Button (calendar toggle), and PART_Popup. Override Template only if you re-provide all parts AND wire PART_Popup.PlacementTarget for correct popup positioning.
DatePickerTextBox template must propagate Foreground/Font via TextElement.* on the template root so child text inherits theme brushes and re-paints on theme switch.

Theming Calendar day cells (CalendarDayButton) alone is insufficient — the Calendar popup's header chrome (prev/next/header button), the weekday title row (DayTitleTemplateResourceKey), and the year/decade grid live inside CalendarItem's template. Re-template CalendarItem and set DayTitleTemplateResourceKey inside ControlTemplate.Resources to fully theme the popup.
Trigger Property='IsSelected' does NOT exist on CalendarButton — only on CalendarDayButton. Build will fail with MC4109 if used.
relatedShellPolishLogEntry: shell-polish-log.json issue id=12 (theme + language persistence) is separate; this file documents the picker-styling sub-phase.
